title: Viners Barware Brushed Silver Stainless Steel Ice Tongs
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our stylish and modern deluxe ice tongs are perfect for making drinks with ice and fruit when entertaining. They are elegant and expertly crafted, making them the perfect gift for any occasion

YOUR SERVING PLEASURE | Designed with a natural spring action bend, these tongs are comfortable to use and will pick up ice blocks without slippage. The 17 centimetre long tongs end with ridged edges giving a secure grip on the ice while you make cocktails

MADE TO LAST | These ice tongs are made to last. Made from rust-resistant stainless steel, the tongs are strongly built and won't lose their shape. Hand wash only avoiding abrasive sponges and wash before first use.

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners barware collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and wine buckets

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from fine quality materials
description: From the manufacturer Foil Cutter Champagne Bucket 4L Single Wall Wine Cooler Waiter’s Friend Bottle Stopper Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 2.9 out of 5 stars 7 4.5 out of 5 stars 34 3.7 out of 5 stars 9 4.5 out of 5 stars 162 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 Price — no data — no data £8.75 £ 8 . 75 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 Description Our foil cutter makes removing protective champagne and wine bottle seals easy. The flexible body fits on any size and shape bottle neck, then squeeze and rotate to cut away the foil. Store and serve your favourite champagne or sparkling wine from this large capacity ice bucket. Highly effective in keeping wines cold and suitable for all bottle shapes. This versatile ice bucket is great for holding ice or storing freshly prepared fruits. Finished in high quality stainless steel, this bucket will add style and elegance to your barware collection. Our waiter’s friend design is the world’s most recognisable 2-step corkscrew and bottle opener. The versatile wine opener is made for easy cork extraction with an ergonomic shape and comfortable lever action. The triangular shaped stainless steel bottle stopper with rubber sealing rings will create an air tight seal on a variety of different bottle shapes, keeping the contents fresher for longer. Made From soft-touch plastic Stainless Steel Stainless Steel Zinc Metal and Rubber Available In Black Silver | Gold Silver | Gold Silver & Black Silver & Black
